featureDetection.rationale: Queries native CSS.supports('container-type','anchored') and provides a clear support badge explaining how to enable flags.

gracefulFallback.rationale: The sandbox layout remains stable and the anchor button is draggable on all browsers, falling back gracefully.

genuineInteraction.rationale: Highly interactive menu grid controls positioning in real time, prompting layout engine recalculations.

builderMultipleDemos.rationale: Forms part of a beautiful and thorough gallery of 5 distinct positioning demos.

designSystemContrast.rationale: Follows the project design system guidelines cleanly with high-contrast text and background variables.
